gmcm.language.name: Language
gmcm.language.tooltip: Switch player-facing text between Chinese and English.
gmcm.reserveFastSlots: Reserve CPU slots for fast jobs
terminal.sort.name: Name
terminal.title: {0}  -  Showing {1:N0}/{2:N0} types, {3:N0} sources
terminal.empty: The network has no items. Connect chests or storage drives, then deposit items.
terminal.help: Left-click item: withdraw a stack  ·  Right-click: withdraw 1  ·  Click backpack item: deposit
terminal.reserved: This item is reserved by a CPU job and cannot be withdrawn right now.
terminal.depositBlocked: Cannot deposit: the network is full, the item is locked, or this item type is not allowed.
terminal.lockHoldItem: Hold the item you want to lock or unlock in the toolbar first.
items.BasicCircuit.name: Basic Circuit
items.BasicCircuit.description: Core component for early and mid-game network devices.
items.AdvancedCircuit.name: Advanced Circuit
items.AdvancedCircuit.description: Core component for late-game network devices and crafting matrices.
items.EliteCircuit.name: Elite Circuit
items.NetworkCable.name: Network Cable
items.NetworkCable.description: Cable used to connect network cores, terminals, and interfaces.
items.LinkTool.name: Link Tool
items.LinkTool.description: Right-click chests or machines to bind them to the selected network.
items.BlankPattern.name: Blank Pattern
items.BlankPattern.description: Used to encode crafting or processing patterns.
items.CraftingPattern.name: Crafting Pattern
items.ProcessingPattern.name: Processing Pattern
items.StorageCell1K.name: 1K Item Storage Cell
items.StorageCell1K.description: SVSAP byte storage cell with 1,024 bytes; about 8,128 items of one type.
items.StorageCell4K.name: 4K Item Storage Cell
items.StorageCell4K.description: SVSAP byte storage cell with 4,096 bytes; about 32,704 items of one type.
items.StorageCell64K.name: 64K Item Storage Cell
items.StorageCell64K.description: SVSAP byte storage cell with 65,536 bytes; about 524,224 items of one type.
items.StorageCell256K.name: 256K Item Storage Cell
items.StorageCell256K.description: SVSAP byte storage cell with 262,144 bytes; about 2,097,088 items of one type.
items.StorageCell1024K.name: 1024K Item Storage Cell
items.StorageCell1024K.description: SVSAP byte storage cell with 1,048,576 bytes; about 8,388,544 items of one type.
items.StorageCell4096K.name: 4096K Item Storage Cell
items.StorageCell4096K.description: SVSAP byte storage cell with 4,194,304 bytes; about 33,554,368 items of one type.
items.FilterCard.name: Filter Card
items.FilterCard.description: Whitelist/blacklist upgrade for importers and exporters.
items.CapacityCard.name: Capacity Card
items.CapacityCard.description: Increases the number of items moved per import/export operation.
items.SpeedCard.name: Speed Card
items.QualityCard.name: Quality Card
items.QualityCard.description: Controls normal, silver, gold, and iridium quality priority.
machines.NetworkCore.name: Network Core
machines.NetworkCore.description: Main controller block for a network; stores the NetworkId and membership.
machines.NetworkTerminal.name: Network Terminal
machines.NetworkTerminal.description: Opens the item search, withdraw, and deposit interface for the whole network.
machines.CraftingTerminal.name: Crafting Terminal
machines.CraftingTerminal.description: Performs normal crafting directly from network inventory.
machines.PatternTerminal.name: Pattern Terminal
machines.StorageInterface.name: Storage Interface
machines.StorageInterface.description: Adds adjacent chests as physical network storage.
machines.StorageDrive.name: Storage Drive
machines.StorageDrive.description: Holds item storage cells for digital network storage.
machines.Importer.name: Importer
machines.Importer.description: Pulls items from an adjacent chest or machine into the network.
machines.Exporter.name: Exporter
machines.Exporter.description: Exports selected network items into an adjacent chest or machine.
machines.MachineInterface.name: Machine Interface
machines.MachineInterface.description: Used by processing patterns to feed machines and collect outputs.
machines.PatternProvider.name: Pattern Provider
machines.PatternProvider.description: Stores patterns and sends jobs to machine interfaces.
machines.MolecularAssembler.name: Molecular Assembler
machines.CraftingCpuCore.name: Crafting CPU Core
machines.CraftingCpuCore.description: Controller for autocrafting requests; provides one job slot.
machines.CraftingMatrix1K.name: 1K Crafting Matrix
machines.CraftingMatrix4K.name: 4K Crafting Matrix
machines.CraftingMatrix16K.name: 16K Crafting Matrix
machines.CraftingMatrix64K.name: 64K Crafting Matrix
machines.CoProcessor.name: Co-Processor
machines.CoProcessor.description: Adds parallel dispatch capacity within a single crafting process.
machines.CraftingMonitor.name: Crafting Monitor
